tools.name: chrome_devtools_navigate
tools.description: Navigate the active browser tab to a URL.

wait_until.description: Page lifecycle event to wait for.

tools.name: chrome_devtools_take_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a full-page screenshot as base64 PNG.

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click an element by index from the last snapshot.

tools.name: browser_fill
tools.description: Type text into an input field identified by index.

tools.name: sandbox_get_context
tools.description: Return metadata about the running sandbox.

tools.name: sandbox_convert_to_markdown
tools.description: Convert a document to clean markdown.

path.description: Absolute sandbox path to the source file.

tools.name: chrome_devtools_bad_union
tools.description: Intentionally uses oneOf to prove the generator rejects unsupported schemas.
